name: OrderList
description: OrderList is used to managed the order of a collection.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value of the component.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Name of the field that uniquely identifies the a record in the data.

props.name: selection
props.description: Selected items in the list.

props.name: metaKeySelection
props.description: Defines whether metaKey is required or not for the selection. When true metaKey needs to be pressed to select or unselect an item and when set to false selection of each item can be toggled individually. On touch enabled devices, metaKeySelection is turned off automatically.

props.name: autoOptionFocus
props.description: Whether to focus on the first visible or selected element.

props.name: focusOnHover
props.description: When enabled, the focus is placed on the hovered option.

props.name: listStyle
props.description: Inline style of the the list element.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Whether the list optimizes layout based on screen size.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary when responsiveness is enabled.

props.name: striped
props.description: Whether to displays rows with alternating colors.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the viewport, a scrollbar is defined if height of list exceeds this value.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the button inside the component.

props.name: moveUpButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move up button inside the component.

props.name: moveTopButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move top button inside the component.

props.name: moveDownButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move down button inside the component.

props.name: moveBottomButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move bottom button inside the component.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive list element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying list element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: reorder
events.description: Callback to invoke when the list is reordered.

events.name: selection-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when selection changes.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Item of the component */ item: any; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; /** * Index of the item. */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: option
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Option of the component */ option: any; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; /** * Index of the option. */ index: number; }): VNode[]
